data.title: Data Encryption
data.description: Ensures end-to-end encryption for data at rest and in transit to protect customer data.

data.title: DDoS Protection
data.description: Implements measures to protect against distributed denial-of-service attacks.

data.title: Identity and Access Management
data.description: Employs strict identity and access management controls to manage user permissions.

data.title: Security Monitoring and Threat Detection
data.description: Proactively monitors systems for unusual activity and potential threats.

data.title: Regular Security Audits
data.description: Conducts regular security audits and assessments to identify and mitigate vulnerabilities.
